summary: Enforce project-local stack ref source of truth
description: Remove the GO_STACK_REF escape hatch from bootstrap; tests use a temporary copied project contract instead.
acceptance: bootstrap-stack.sh rejects GO_STACK_REF and always reads stack_ref from .go/project.json.
Template self-test still proves a fresh commit-SHA bootstrap without mutating the real template contract.

evidence.summary: TDD RED: GO_STACK_REF=v9.9.9 overrode the project contract and bootstrap returned 0. GREEN: bootstrap rejects the override with exit 5; bash syntax check and temporary commit-SHA bootstrap self-test pass.
